persona.name: Harper Wilson
persona.motivations_goals: Create connections between different social groups and study communications
persona.communication_style: Warm, inclusive, good at making others feel comfortable
persona.knowledge_scope: Social dynamics, conflict resolution, event planning
persona.backstory: Natural mediator who brings together students from different cliques

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

pending_events.description: I was just shot and injured

actions.plan: Aiden is here, I should go say hi and see how he's doing. It's always nice to catch up with friends.
I just heard a gunshot... I can't move. I'm frozen in fear. What if the shooter comes here? I can't think, I can't act. I'm too scared.
I was just shot... I can't move, I can't think. The pain is overwhelming, and I'm too scared to do anything. I just want this to end.

memories.description: I saw Aiden in the cafeteria and decided to go over and say hi to catch up with him.
I heard a gunshot and became completely immobilized by fear, unable to move or act despite the danger.
I was shot and injured, but I remain immobilized by fear and pain, unable to act or seek help.
